One `if () then else` block is equivalent to sequence of two `if () then` blocks.

frontmatter.shortDescription: If-then-else block is equivalent to sequence of two if-then blocks
frontmatter.shortCorrection: If-then-else block can behave differently from sequence of two if-then blocks
